title: Transgender Body Image Resources - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Transgender Body Image Resources 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALWAYS HERE BOOKSTORE MUTUAL AID LOCKERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mutual aid lockers that provide supplies such as gender-affirming gear (chest binders, bras), informational pamphlets on how to safely use gender-affirming clothes, socks and underwear, makeup, menstrual products, Narcan, contraception, (including emergency contraception), and hand sanitizer. Also occasionally offers trans tape, breast forms, tucking underwear, and other trans shapeware. Supplies availability is dependent on donations. 4555 N Williams Avenue Portland, OR 97217 Eligibility: Individuals in the LGBTQIA+ community Hours: Wednesday-Sunday 11am-6pm Email (503) 208-4799 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE LAVENDER NETWORK LGBTQ2+ SERVICE AND COMMUNITY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community center and event space for LGTBQ2+ individuals and local organizations focused on LGBTQ2+ services. Services include information about community resources and a clothing closet with gender-affirming items. 1590 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 342-7105 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSITION HEALTH COMPREHENSIVE WELLNESS AND QUEER MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gender-affirming healthcare and health education to queer, transgender, and intersex communities. Services include hormone therapy, electrolysis, and body image resurces, as well as assistance with name and indentification changes. 1590 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 357-7594 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALWAYS HERE BOOKSTORE MUTUAL AID LOCKERS THE LAVENDER NETWORK LGBTQ2+ SERVICE AND COMMUNITY CENTER TRANSITION HEALTH COMPREHENSIVE WELLNESS AND QUEER MEDICINE
